title: Buttery Hunan Rigatoni Pasta
description: A quick, dairyfree fusion pasta that blends the bold flavors of Hunan cuisine with rich, buttery sauce.

ingredients.name: vegan butter
ingredients.notes: clarified coconut oil or vegan butter

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni until al dente (about 10–12 minutes).
While the pasta cooks, heat the vegan butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted.
Add the minced garlic, ginger, and crushed red pepper; sauté for 1–2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and fish sauce; bring to a gentle simmer.
Let the sauce reduce slightly for 3–4 minutes, then add the cooked rigatoni and toss to coat.
Stir in nutritional yeast for a subtle cheesy note, if using, and adjust seasoning with salt or more soy sauce.
Remove from heat and serve immediately, garnishing with extra scallions if desired.
Enjoy a creamy, spicy pasta that’s ready in under 30 minutes!
